description_long: This upright piano features a rectangular wooden body with a flat top and a slightly protruding keyboard section. The keyboard consists of alternating white and black keys, with three metallic pedals positioned below the keyboard. The piano's legs are simple and straight, supporting the main body, and the back is a solid, unadorned panel. The surface has a reddish-brown finish, giving it a classic, polished wood appearance. No visible brand or logo is present, and there is no music stand attached to the top.
description: A reddish-brown upright piano with a full keyboard, three pedals, and a flat, solid back. The design is simple and classic, with a polished wood-like finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keyboard, three pedals, and the piano's main playing area.
description_view_1: Angled front-side view highlighting the keyboard, pedals, and the depth of the piano body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid, unadorned back panel and the flat top surface.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the back panel and the side profile of the piano's legs and body.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard keyboard with approximately 52 white keys and 36 black keys in alternating groups, arranged in a typical piano pattern.
